title: Fix config parser crash on empty string values
description: The config parser was raising a ValueError when encountering empty string values in YAML config files. Added a check to treat empty strings as valid values.
diff:
diff --git a/config/loader.py b/config/loader.py
index 1d2e3f4..a5b6c7d 100644
--- a/config/loader.py
+++ b/config/loader.py
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ def load_config(path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
     config = {}
     for key, value in raw_config.items():
         key = key.strip()
-        if not value:
+        if value is None:
             raise ValueError(f"Config key '{key}' has no value")
         config[key] = value
comments: rosa: Makes sense, empty string is a valid value. Approve.
author: sam
